rules.title: Conditions on reference date
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Condition not met.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure all conditions are satisfied as of the filing dates."

rules.title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors/sellers debarred
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer, promoters, directors or selling shareholders are debarred.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no party is debarred."

rules.title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Promoters or directors are associated with a debarred company.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no association with debarred companies."

rules.title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer, promoters or directors are fraudulent borrowers.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no fraudulence."

rules.title: Disqualification: fugitive economic offender
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Promoters or directors are fugitive economic offenders.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no association with fugitives."

rules.title: Outstanding options for employees (ESOP)
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer has outstanding ESOPs.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no outstanding ESOPs."

rules.title: Outstanding stock appreciation rights (SAR)
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer has outstanding SARs.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no outstanding SARs."

rules.title: Fully paid-up convertible securities
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer has outstanding mandatory convertibles.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no outstanding mandatory convertibles."

rules.title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer has outstanding convertible securities or rights.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure no outstanding convertibles or rights."

rules.title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.check:
fun i =>
      let ntaOK := (lengthIs i.net_tangible_assets 3) && allGeNat i.net_tangible_assets 30000000
      let moneyOK := (i.monetary_asset_ratio ≤ 50) || i.used_monetary_assets || i.is_offer_for_sale_only
      ntaOK && moneyOK
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      let ntaMsg :=
        if !(lengthIs i.net_tangible_assets 3) then "Need 3 full-year NTA figures."
        else if !(allGeNat i.net_tangible_assets 30000000) then "Each year’s net tangible assets must be ≥ ₹3.0 crore."
        else ""
      let moneyMsg :=
        if i.is_offer_for_sale_only then ""
        else if i.monetary_asset_ratio > 50 && !i.used_monetary_assets then "Monetary assets exceed 50% of NTA without evidence of committed/actual use."
        else ""
      String.intercalate " " ([ntaMsg, moneyMsg].filter (· ≠ "")),
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate firm commitments/use of monetary assets, or restructure to OSF-only; ensure each NTA year ≥ ₹3 cr."

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if !(lengthIs i.operating_profits 3) then "Need 3 full-year operating profit figures."
      else
        let fails := i.operating_profits.zipIdx |>.filter (fun (x, idx) => x < 150000000)
        let years := fails.map (fun (_, idx) => s!"Year {idx + 1}")
        "Operating profit below ₹15 cr in: " ++ String.intercalate ", " years,
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥ ₹15 cr operating profit in each of the last 3 full financial years (restated, consolidated)."

rules.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if !(lengthIs i.net_worths 3) then "Need 3 full-year net worth figures."
      else
        let fails := i.net_worths.zipIdx |>.filter (fun (x, idx) => x < 10000000)
        let years := fails.map (fun (_, idx) => s!"Year {idx + 1}")
        "Net worth below ₹1 cr in: " ++ String.intercalate ", " years,
    remedy? := some "Increase equity/retained earnings to meet ≥ ₹1 cr in each of the last 3 full years."

rules.title: Revenue from new name activity ≥ 50% in last year
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.changed_name_recently && i.percent_revenue_from_new_name < 50 then
        "Changed name within 1 year but <50% revenue from new-name activity in the preceding full year."
      else "Condition not met.",
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥50% revenue from the activity indicated by the new name or defer filing."

rules.title: Eligibility for IPO through book-building process
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer does not meet the eligibility criteria for IPO through book-building process.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure at least 75% allocation to QIBs and complete QIB allocations."

rules.title: General corporate purposes limit ≤ 35%
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Amount for general corporate purposes exceeds 35%.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure the amount for general corporate purposes does not exceed 35%."

rules.title: Unidentified acquisition/investment limit ≤ 25%
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Amount for unidentified acquisitions or investments exceeds 25%.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure the amount for unidentified acquisitions or investments does not exceed 25%."

rules.title: SR shares issued to promoters/founders with executive positions
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "SR shares were not issued only to promoters/founders who hold an executive position.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure SR shares are issued only to promoters/founders with executive positions."

issuer_questions.question: Is the issuer debarred from accessing the capital market?
Are any of the directors associated with a debarred company?
Is the issuer or its promoters/directors fraudulent borrowers?
Are any of the promoters or directors fugitive economic offenders?
Does the issuer have outstanding ESOPs?
Does the issuer have outstanding SARs?
Does the issuer have outstanding mandatory convertibles?
Are there any outstanding convertible securities or rights?
Provide NTA for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise).
What % of NTA is held in monetary assets?
Have excess monetary assets been used or firmly committed?
Is the IPO entirely an offer for sale (no fresh issue)?
Provide operating profit for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise).
Provide net worth for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise).
Has the company changed its name within the last 1 year?
What % of last year’s revenue came from the new-name activity?
Does the issuer use book-building process for IPO?
Has at least 75% allocation to QIBs been completed?
What % of funds are allocated for general corporate purposes?
Are SR shares issued only to promoters/founders with executive positions?
Has an application been made to a stock exchange for in-principle approval?
Is there an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of specified securities?
Are all promoter securities held in dematerialised form?
Have all partly paid-up equity shares been fully paid-up or forfeited?
What percentage of the issue proceeds is allocated to general corporate purposes?
How long have the equity shares being offered for sale been held by sellers (in months)?
Are there any partly paid-up shares?
Are the specified securities fully paid up?
